reviews.quote: We were 5 french people discovering the city and the tour with Yusuf was very useful to learn more about the history, the curiosities of the city and to be more aware of where we are for the next days exploring the city. We recommend this tour with Yusuf!
reviews.author: Anna Antraygues

reviews.quote: Yusuf the tour guide was EXTRAORDINARY. You must take his tour for a thoughtful, funny and well-timed experience. Bonus: he'll show you great photograph spots.
reviews.author: Samyukta V.

reviews.quote: I've done a couple of tours in Berlin before and honestly they all focused on the Wall, Cold War stuff. This one felt completely different. It's more about the real origins of Berlin, where the city actually started and how much of it disappeared.
reviews.author: Michal D.

reviews.quote: Yusuf managed to navigate through centuries of history, from the Red Town Hall and St. Mary's Church to the futuristic skyline of Alexanderplatz. Every stop felt relevant and engaging.
reviews.author: Karen Sells Brown

reviews.quote: Charismatic and knowledgeable guide, capable of drawing comparisons between East Germany and DDR. The use of pictures and maps helped a lot with understanding Berlin's history from the 17th century till today.
reviews.author: Casper Bollerup Neuer

reviews.quote: I was traveling solo and decided to try this tour, so glad I did. Yusuf was super knowledgeable and funny, making the walk really enjoyable. If you want interesting stories while wandering Berlin, this is the one.
reviews.author: Mikkel Sørensen

reviews.quote: Yusuf is a kind man, easy going, communication is fluent. I like the guidance through historical Berlin. I recommend it especially for beginners or for those looking for a brief, short tour.
reviews.author: Michal D.
